programme.title: Just For Laughs S25
programme.desc: Just For Laughswill tickle everyone's funny bone with its hilarious practical jokes, hidden camera pranks, and other creative hijinks.

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Whale with Steve Backshall gives a stunning and comprehensive overview of the world of whales, dolphins and porpoises. Adventurer and conservationist Steve Backshall travels from the Azores to the Arctic, capturing breathtaking underwater footage in each unique habitat.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6
programme.desc: Ollie and friends' magic tools are stolen by a mysterious magician, who tests their wit with elaborate traps without the help of their tools. The gang lend the squares their go kart to do their paper route but things go wrong when the squares don't take care of the go kart.

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr3
programme.desc: Go Jetters go bigger as our plucky international heroes Xuli, Kyan, Lars and Foz, together with their disco-grooving mentor Ubercorn, discover lots more about our world. And we learn much more about each of the Go Jetters too. Travelling from the top of the planet to the very bottom, their action-packed adventures take them to truly incredible places. And there's a good chance Grandmaster Glitch has got there first to cause his usual chaos!

programme.title: 123 Number Squad S1
programme.desc: Can the Number Squad use simple division for sharing to divide the 3 golden seaweeds so that they have enough to help other animals and for Shelly Mer-Mai to wear as a new Tiara at the concert? Every location that Prince Aamil and his guard, Lux have picked to install a statue of the Sultan, it will cast a big shadow in the wrong place. Can Paula and Tim help Lux find the perfect place?

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures
programme.desc: Moka, the King of the Savannah's son, a naive and reckless little crocodile, leaves home one day to go explore his vast kingdom. Cherry, a brave rhinoceros from the Royal Guard is sent along to insure his protection. But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: Viking Skool
programme.desc: Three young students, Erik, Ylva and Arni, embark on challenging and thrilling adventures while they train to become glorious Viking warriors.

programme.title: Pokemon Ultimate Journeys: The Series
programme.desc: The stakes are higher than ever for Ash, Goh, and Chloe as they advance toward their goals! As the Pokmon World Coronation Series tournament heats up, intensive training is in store for Ash, Pikachu, and their Pokmon friends.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: Eugene Lim's treatment fails, Joseph Nair fears relapse, and Lee Hwee Ling discovers new growth. As their cancers evolve, these three young cancer patients struggle to face their unknown.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: Talking Point is Mediacorp Ch 5's longest running current affairs programme. With a fresh approach to tackling the issues of the day, Talking Point investigates a current issue or event, offering different perspectives to local stories and reveals how it all affects you.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Rosnani is tempted to start a new life with Louis until she finds out the truth from Jessica. Syirah decides she is not cut out to be a mother. Handsome is eager to learn the ropes of running Boss Lady and seems unintimidated by the challenges.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver is back with an uplifting series that takes us through the whole year – from spring to winter – celebrating gorgeous ingredients and the delicious dishes we can make with them.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.desc: Ian Wright presents the game show where the difference between winning life-changing money and going home with nothing rests entirely on the roll of a ball.

programme.desc: The Alison Love murder case takes a startling turn when the true relationship between killer and victim is revealed — forcing everyone to rethink what they thought they knew.

programme.desc: Big Adventures: Into Thailand With Sue Perkins.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: When the police ask Deaf catering worker Alison to lip-read criminals' conversations, she is plunged into a high-stakes new world. Her assessment of the gang's clandestine meetings quickly becomes key to unlocking the investigation. But as she finds herself increasingly drawn to one of the suspects, Alison's feelings about the case become complicated.

programme.title: Clean it, Fix it – Series 4
programme.desc: Master builder and household favourite Tommy Walsh, expert pro cleaner Maxine Dwyer and creative carpenter Asher Edwards help people across the UK to renovate and improve their homes. The team has two days to transform a living space in desperate need of some love. Series 4 sees enterprising co-presenter Mark Wright and a new expert de-clutterer join in the challenge of making tired homes relievable – without breaking the bank.

programme.title: Long Weekends
programme.desc: This time, we're heading to Miri, Sarawak! From trekking through ancient caves to discovering hidden perfume bars and trying their authentic Sarawak Cake Lapis, this underrated Borneo city packs a punch. Can we uncover the best eats, sights, and experiences all without going over 600? Watch till the end to see if Miri deserves a spot on your weekend getaway list!

programme.title: Scene City: Recital
programme.desc: Moments before a prestigious piano recital, the mounting pressure to perform begins to dawn on Bernice, 16, as her life begins to crumble around her.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1
programme.desc: Watson runs into brilliant con artist and an old friend of Sherlock Holmes, Irene Adler, when her son Angus is admitted to UHOP for temporary paralysis. The fellow dpctors help Watson after he grows fond of Angus and pursue various leads to find a cure to his illness.

programme.title: Love 972 皇上的最爱
programme.desc: 最后一件圣物圣旨的线索终于浮出水面员外已取得一块碎片而剩余的两块碎片众人需要再次分组出发前往麻将馆与火锅店完成全新挑战 本以为是轻松的吃喝玩乐没想到任务难度全面升级 他们能否顺利完成挑战拼凑出最后的圣旨.

programme.title: 吃货横扫深圳
programme.desc: 北上吃喝玩乐成为港人热话观众出行前当然想获取更多相关情报吃货主持陆浩明彭慧中林秀怡梁凯晴前赴深圳四出探店带来滋味又好玩的攻略深圳的平价美食令人趋之若鹜数十元有交易的蟹黄面两百多元就可品尝包含海胆的Omakase同样吸引也会介绍网红打卡热点入住希腊风情民宿让各位秒到欧洲.

programme.title: 业落夕阳
programme.desc: 神秘力量促使Krish与Ramesh和解一起肩负祖业豆豆失踪后镜子竟出现豆豆被困在林中 Ramesh于是把镜子交给了盛达果不其然豆豆从镜中飞出盛达与错过的女人云秀擦肩盛达回想自己和泇伟求过同一支签一者放弃一者结婚似乎都没有好结果盛达终把签烧掉而他也倒卧不醒.

programme.title: 锦月如歌
programme.desc: 为保家族爵位何家长女何晏周也饰被迫戴上面具扮做何家嫡长子何如非少年时何晏于贤昌馆初识天之骄子肖珏丞磊饰后为摆脱家族命运毅然离开学馆奔赴沙场多年后何晏荣归故里却因兄长何如非白澍饰回归被家族设计何晏大难不死后转换身份化身城门校尉女儿禾晏女扮男装前往掖州投军立志拿回属于自己的一切禾晏结交了温润如玉的楚昭张康乐饰更是与肖珏再次重逢可肖珏怀疑禾晏是奸细处处针对反复试探禾晏死抱肖珏大腿并以掖州卫第一的成绩向肖珏证明了自己的能力.

programme.title: 锦月如歌
programme.desc: 为保家族爵位何家长女何晏周也饰被迫戴上面具扮做何家嫡长子何如非少年时何晏于贤昌馆初识天之骄子肖珏丞磊饰后为摆脱家族命运毅然离开学馆奔赴沙场多年后何晏荣归故里却因兄长何如非白澍饰回归被家族设计何晏大难不死后转换身份化身城门校尉女儿禾晏女扮男装前往掖州投军立志拿回属于自己的一切禾晏结交了温润如玉的楚昭张康乐饰更是与肖珏再次重逢可肖珏怀疑禾晏是奸细处处针对反复试探禾晏死抱肖珏大腿并以掖州卫第一的成绩向肖珏证明了自己的能力.

programme.title: 你来工作我来玩

programme.title: 业落夕阳
programme.desc: 阿诚知道纸扎人不会死追问以后梁伯不在留下他怎么办梁伯唏嘘不语老王去世阿诚在办理丧事时对老王的孙女Faye产生了情愫阿诚依Faye的模样做了纸扎人希望两人成双成对梁伯怕阿诚为情所伤残忍告知不管他喜欢谁都不会有结果阿诚生无可恋一步步朝滂沱大雨走去.

programme.title: 锦月如歌
programme.desc: 为保家族爵位何家长女何晏周也饰被迫戴上面具扮做何家嫡长子何如非少年时何晏于贤昌馆初识天之骄子肖珏丞磊饰后为摆脱家族命运毅然离开学馆奔赴沙场多年后何晏荣归故里却因兄长何如非白澍饰回归被家族设计何晏大难不死后转换身份化身城门校尉女儿禾晏女扮男装前往掖州投军立志拿回属于自己的一切禾晏结交了温润如玉的楚昭张康乐饰更是与肖珏再次重逢可肖珏怀疑禾晏是奸细处处针对反复试探禾晏死抱肖珏大腿并以掖州卫第一的成绩向肖珏证明了自己的能力.

programme.title: Interns
programme.desc: An opportunity arises when the interns discover a call for local designers to submit costume designs for Malaysian celebrity Miss Royaltee's concert in Singapore. programme.title: Konichiwa Superlawak

programme.desc: Meet the M family! Mani, the wide-eyed father and Mages, his bossy wife, are aliens masquerading as humans on Earth, trying to comprehend and study human behavior. Join this oddball family in Ayalaan - Out of this World on a whimsical journey of understanding the complex beings that are humans!

programme.desc: Motherhood may be a full-time responsibility, but for many women, it is not the end of ambition.
